name: @platform/worker
description: Worker runtime for the Fanaa Platform AI Studio (PLATFORM.md §14–§15). Drains the @platform/ingest queue, runs the @platform/ai-engine M5 pipeline against jobs, resolves providers via the M4 registry, records cost rows, persists run/step records to a RunStore, and supports deterministic replay. Future Inngest adapter slots in behind the same Queue<IngestJob> interface — no Inngest dependency in M6.
